faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Short answers to how CyberFarm works.

airdrop.title: 🪂 AirDrop CFM Token — Q4 2026
airdrop.body:
We're launching our own CFM token on the TON network. Snapshot — Dec 31, 2026. TGE and listing on TON DEX — Q1-Q2 2027.

Every action you take in the game already accumulates allocation points:
• Stars pack purchase — ×3 points
• TON deposit — ×5 points
• Drone upgrade / turret purchase — +1 point per gold spent
• Victorious raid — +10 points
• Referred a friend (who joined) — +50 points
• Battle Pass / VIP — extra multipliers on top (×2 / ×3)

Important: points are calculated retroactively — all your past activity is already counted. Tiers: Bronze → Silver → Gold → Platinum → Diamond. The higher the tier, the bigger the CFM allocation at TGE.

💡 Goal: be in the top tier by snapshot on Dec 31, 2026. Every gold you buy is future CFM.

staking.title: 🔒 Stake Gold — coming soon
staking.body:
Lock your gold for 1 / 7 / 30 days and receive a fixed TON payout at the end of the term. Perfect for turning accumulated gold into a real TON asset without using the P2P market.

Rates and parameters will be published at launch. Launch — after the AirDrop CFM announcement.

battlepass.title: 🎟 Battle Pass — coming soon
battlepass.body:
Seasonal pass, 30 days, 59 ⭐. What's inside:
• ×2 multiplier on AirDrop points
• Exclusive cosmetic drone skin
• +1 additional turret slot for the pass duration
• Daily bonus — +50 gold and full energy
• 4-hour daily raid immunity window of your choice

Launch — after staking.

vip.title: 💎 VIP — coming soon
vip.body:
Premium subscription, 149 ⭐/month. What it gives:
• ×2 passive income across all drones
• +1 drone slot above the regular limit
• Permanent shield from raids
• VIP badge in leaderboard, market and raids
• +10% attack bonus
• ×3 multiplier on AirDrop points

Launch — after Battle Pass.

essence.title: What is the game
essence.body: CyberFarm is a cyber drone farm inside Telegram. You collect combat and scout drones that generate passive gold every second — even when the app is closed. Defense turrets keep your farm safe from raiders, while you can raid other players and steal their coins. The endgame is converting gold to real TON via the P2P market, the weekly contest pool, and the referral network.

earning.title: How to earn
earning.body:
Five income streams:
• Passive — every drone produces gold each second. More drones / higher levels = more output.
• Taps — clicking a drone gives gold at the rate of your highest drone level (L1 — 0.1, L2 — 0.3, L3 — 0.5 per tap). Costs energy.
• Raids — attack other players and grab up to 10% of their balance.
• Market — sell your units and equipment for gold or TON.
• Weekly contest — the top of the weekly_earned leaderboard splits a TON prize pool.
Plus: daily login bonus (day 7 is TON), 100 g starter pack and the referral program.

raids.title: Raid rules
raids.body:
• You need working drones — broken ones can't fight.
• Attack power = sum of (level × 10) across drones, combat type gets +20%. Defense = sum of defense_power of the target's turrets. Victory if attack > defense after a random ±20% shift.
• Victory: take 10% of the target's balance. Defeat: you lose up to 5% of the attempted loot to the defender, and your weakest drone breaks.
• Cooldown: you can only attack the same target once per hour.
• Anti-farm: no attacks on accounts younger than 2 hours or with balance below 150 gold.
• Too many raids in a row → captcha. Suspicious automated rhythm → temporary ban.

referrals.title: Referral program
referrals.body:
Three-level rewards — invite friends through your link (see the Friends section in Profile).
• Rewards are paid ONLY for Telegram Stars purchases (Starter, Rescue, Shield, etc). TON wallet top-ups don't count.
• % from Stars purchase (in TON equivalent): L1 — 1%, L2 — 0.5%, L3 — 0.05%.
• Gold bonus for progress once your friend hits 20 raids + 1000 gold (or upgrades their first drone to L2): L1 — 1000 gold, L2 — 500, L3 — 250.
No caps, no expiration. Full payout history lives in the Friends section.

rules.title: Rules and bans
rules.body:
Anything that breaks fair play is forbidden:
• Bots, scripts and auto-clickers on taps or raids.
• Alt-account networks used to farm yourself.
• Exploiting economy bugs or cooldown bypasses.
• Inflating the referral program with fake registrations.

If the system detects suspicious activity, you get a temporary ban. While banned, raids are blocked and you see a countdown screen — once it expires, access is restored. Repeated violations lead to longer bans and possible disqualification from the contest.

contest.contribution: 3% of TON sales on P2P market goes to the pool
contest.rules: The winner earns the most per week: drone income + raid trophies. Draw every Monday.
contest.rolloverAbove: The draw happens once the pool reaches at least ◈ {{min}} TON — threshold already met.
contest.rolloverBelow: The pool is still below the ◈ {{min}} TON threshold — if it stays below by Monday, the draw rolls over to next week and the collected TON stays in the pool.
